rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for port assumptions/guarantees, and implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must reference valid component ports and features in their respective scopes.
Do not introduce package-qualified names or types not present in the input AADL model.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only declared variables and helpers visible in the same annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Component type contracts should use assumptions for input bounds and guarantees for output behavior.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not assume numeric types for event ports or opaque data types in AGREE expressions.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
